testcase.name: test_admin_members

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected list of members assert False + where False = isinstance({'limit': 20, 'members': [{'account_value': 5132.5, 'balance_override': {'actual_balance': 1000.0, 'adjustment_amount': -4132.5, 'created_at': '2026-02-12T06:53:50.735514+00:00', 'effective_date': '2026-02-12', ...}, 'created_at': '2026-01-10T09:23:24.715077+00:00', 'email': 'iam@ryansalvador.com', ...}, {'account_value': 0, 'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:20:46.780565+00:00', 'email': 'hello@hyperdrivemg.co', ...}, {'account_value': 0, 'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:35:18.966523+00:00', 'email': 'jaspersalvador9413@gmail.com', ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, ...}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_pwa_and_routes.py:285: in test_admin_members assert isinstance(data, list), "Expected list of members" E AssertionError: Expected list of members E assert False E + where False = isinstance({'limit': 20, 'members': [{'account_value': 5132.5, 'balance_override': {'actual_balance': 1000.0, 'adjustment_amount': -4132.5, 'created_at': '2026-02-12T06:53:50.735514+00:00', 'effective_date': '2026-02-12', ...}, 'created_at': '2026-01-10T09:23:24.715077+00:00', 'email': 'iam@ryansalvador.com', ...}, {'account_value': 0, 'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:20:46.780565+00:00', 'email': 'hello@hyperdrivemg.co', ...}, {'account_value': 0, 'allowed_dashboards': ['dashboard', 'profit_tracker', 'trade_monitor', 'profile'], 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:35:18.966523+00:00', 'email': 'jaspersalvador9413@gmail.com', ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, ...}, list)
